steps.title: Represent total savings
steps.content: Sabrina already has 180 dollars. If $x$ is the additional amount she saves, her total savings are $180+x$.

steps.title: Translate at least
steps.content: At least 240 dollars means the total must be greater than or equal to $240$.

steps.title: Match the inequality
steps.content: The inequality is $180+x\ge240$, which matches choice C.
